tasks.subject: Task 0: Scaffold du projet
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Installer Laravel 11 + NativePHP Mobile + Livewire 3 + Preline/Tailwind v4.

**Files:**
- Create: `composer.json`, `package.json`, `.env`, `config/nativephp.php`
- Modify: `vite.config.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `php artisan serve` démarre sans erreur
- [ ] `npm run build` compile sans erreur
- [ ] `php artisan native:run android` lance l'app

**Verify:** `php artisan --version` → Laravel 11.x

```json:metadata
{"files": ["composer.json","package.json",".env","vite.config.js"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan --version", "acceptanceCriteria": ["php artisan serve démarre","npm run build compile","native:run android lance l'app"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Migrations & Modèles
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Créer toutes les migrations et modèles Eloquent avec leurs relations.

**Files:**
- Create: `database/migrations/*` (5 fichiers)
- Create: `app/Models/Profile.php`, `Movie.php`, `WatchlistEntry.php`, `CoWatcher.php`
- Test: `tests/Unit/Models/RelationsTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `php artisan migrate` s'exécute sans erreur
- [ ] Les relations Eloquent fonctionnent
- [ ] 3 tests passent

**Verify:** `php artisan test tests/Unit/Models/RelationsTest.php` → 3 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Models/Profile.php","app/Models/Movie.php","app/Models/WatchlistEntry.php","app/Models/CoWatcher.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test tests/Unit/Models/RelationsTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migrate sans erreur","relations fonctionnent","3 tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TmdbService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Créer le service centralisé d'accès à l'API TMDB avec langue française.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Services/TmdbService.php`
- Test: `tests/Unit/TmdbServiceTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] search() retourne résultats en français
- [ ] getMovie() et getTvShow() retournent les détails
- [ ] getRecommendations() fonctionne
- [ ] 3 tests passent avec Http::fake()

**Verify:** `php artisan test tests/Unit/TmdbServiceTest.php` → 3 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Services/TmdbService.php","config/services.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test tests/Unit/TmdbServiceTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["search en français","getMovie fonctionne","3 tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Layout principal & Onboarding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Créer le layout avec tabs + avatar et l'écran d'onboarding.

**Files:**
- Create: `resources/views/layouts/app.blade.php`, `guest.blade.php`, `home.blade.php`
- Create: `app/Livewire/Onboarding.php`
- Create: `resources/views/livewire/onboarding.blade.php`
- Modify: `routes/web.php`
- Test: `tests/Feature/Livewire/OnboardingTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Onboarding s'affiche si aucun profil
- [ ] Soumission crée Profile et redirige
- [ ] 3 tests passent

**Verify:** `php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/OnboardingTest.php` → 3 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Livewire/Onboarding.php","resources/views/livewire/onboarding.blade.php","resources/views/home.blade.php","routes/web.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/OnboardingTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["onboarding affiché si pas de profil","sauvegarde prénom","3 tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Paramètres (Settings)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Écran de gestion du prénom et des co-watchers.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Livewire/Settings.php`
- Create: `resources/views/livewire/settings.blade.php`
- Test: `tests/Feature/Livewire/SettingsTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Modifier le prénom met à jour le profil
- [ ] Ajouter un co-watcher fonctionne
- [ ] Supprimer un co-watcher fonctionne
- [ ] 4 tests passent

**Verify:** `php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/SettingsTest.php` → 4 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Livewire/Settings.php","resources/views/livewire/settings.blade.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/SettingsTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["modifier prénom","ajouter co-watcher","supprimer co-watcher","4 tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Recherche & Ajout de film
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Modal de recherche TMDB en temps réel + formulaire d'ajout à la watchlist.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Livewire/MovieSearch.php`
- Create: `resources/views/livewire/movie-search.blade.php`
- Test: `tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieSearchTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Recherche appelle TmdbService avec debounce
- [ ] Sélection affiche le formulaire
- [ ] Soumission crée Movie + WatchlistEntry
- [ ] Co-watchers attachés
- [ ] 3 tests passent

**Verify:** `php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieSearchTest.php` → 3 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Livewire/MovieSearch.php","resources/views/livewire/movie-search.blade.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieSearchTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["recherche TMDB","crée Movie + WatchlistEntry","3 tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Listing avec filtres
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Grille de films/séries avec filtres rapides et avancés réactifs.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Livewire/MovieList.php`
- Create: `resources/views/livewire/movie-list.blade.php`
- Test: `tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieListTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Liste en grille 3 colonnes
- [ ] Filtres rapides fonctionnent
- [ ] Filtres avancés (type, genre, durée) fonctionnent
- [ ] 4 tests passent

**Verify:** `php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieListTest.php` → 4 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Livewire/MovieList.php","resources/views/livewire/movie-list.blade.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieListTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grille 3 colonnes","filtres rapides","filtres avancés","4 tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Détail d'un film
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Page de détail avec infos TMDB, avis personnel, favoris et édition.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Livewire/MovieDetail.php`
- Create: `resources/views/livewire/movie-detail.blade.php`
- Test: `tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieDetailTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Affiche titre, synopsis, note, co-watchers
- [ ] Toggle favori fonctionne
- [ ] Édition met à jour en base
- [ ] 3 tests passent

**Verify:** `php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieDetailTest.php` → 3 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Livewire/MovieDetail.php","resources/views/livewire/movie-detail.blade.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/MovieDetailTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["affiche infos","toggle favori","édition fonctionne","3 tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Dashboard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Écran d'accueil avec les 4 sections (favoris, récents, pioche, recommandations TMDB).

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Livewire/Dashboard.php`
- Create: `resources/views/livewire/dashboard.blade.php`
- Test: `tests/Feature/Livewire/DashboardTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Section favoris correcte
- [ ] Section récents triée par watched_at DESC
- [ ] Pioche aléatoire parmi to_watch
- [ ] Repioche sans rechargement
- [ ] Sections vides masquées
- [ ] 4 tests passent

**Verify:** `php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/DashboardTest.php` → 4 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Livewire/Dashboard.php","resources/views/livewire/dashboard.blade.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test tests/Feature/Livewire/DashboardTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["favoris","récents","pioche aléatoire","recommandations TMDB","4 tests passent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Build Android & tests manuels
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vérifier que l'app se lance sur émulateur Android et que le flux complet fonctionne.

**Files:**
- Modify: `config/nativephp.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] App lance sur émulateur Android
- [ ] Onboarding au premier lancement
- [ ] Flux complet fonctionne (checklist manuelle)

**Verify:** `php artisan native:run android` → app visible sur émulateur

```json:metadata
{"files": ["config/nativephp.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan native:run android", "acceptanceCriteria": ["app lance sur Android","onboarding fonctionne","flux complet OK"]}
```
